title: Video Vision
overview: When an old VCR mysteriously shows up at digitizing facility Video Vision, it starts affecting employee Kibby in strange ways. Meanwhile an unlikely romance with a trans man has Kibby’s head in the clouds until she’s brought to her knees by the supernatural force that’s slowly taking control of her body and mind. When Kibby and Gator investigate the VCR’s origins they discover she has unwittingly unlocked the dark dimension of Dr. Analog.
